title: Rob Caswell
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Rob Caswell''' was an illustrator and graphic artist for [[West End Games]] who worked on many ''[[Star Wars]]'' books. Some of his more notable and enduring pieces of vehicle visual design are the Imperial AT-PT one-man walker and the Wild Karrde (Corellian Action VI Transport).
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images by Rob Caswell}}
He provided art for:
*''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''
*[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']]
*[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]
*''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]''
*[[Twin Stars of Kira (West End Games)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']]
*''[[Death Star Technical Companion]]''
*''[[Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters]]''
*''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
